content.query:
CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL cred_ram
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity';


CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_silver
WITH
(
    LOCATION='https://awstoragedatalakeram.blob.core.windows.net/silver',
    CREDENTIAL=cred_ram
)


CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_gold
WITH
(
    LOCATION='https://awstoragedatalakeram.blob.core.windows.net/gold',
    CREDENTIAL=cred_ram
)


CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT format_parquet
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE=PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION='org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.externalinr
WITH
(
    LOCATION='externaleur',
    DATA_SOURCE=source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT=format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT id, symbol,name,current_price,market_cap,total_volume FROM gold.inr

SELECT * from gold.inr
